description: Color photograph, horizontal, with no overlaid graphic text, slogans, or agency seals. It shows two people riding in a small open red parade vehicle (a miniature antique-style fire truck or parade car) down a city street. The vehicle and its surroundings are decorated with numerous small American flags. The man at left is driving, gripping a steering wheel, wearing a ball cap with a thin blue line American flag patch, sunglasses pushed up, and a gray t-shirt reading 'Team...' (partially visible). The woman at right wears aviator sunglasses and a light blue button-down shirt with a small lapel pin; she is smiling and waving with her right hand raised. The urban backdrop includes a marquee reading 'WARNE' and tall buildings. The only text appears on signage and apparel in the scene.
notable_text: WARNE(R) theatre marquee; (cap) thin-blue-line flag; t-shirt 'Team...' (no overlaid graphic text)
